display.purpose: Hero headline only. Fraunces with optical-size axis at 144 — at this scale the serif must look carved.

headline.purpose: Section H2s. Fraunces opsz 96, weight 300, italic accent on one or two key words.

title.purpose: Card H3s and FAQ summaries. Fraunces opsz 24 — text-grade serif, not display.

body.purpose: Inter regular. All long-form reading. Line length capped 65–75ch.

lead.purpose: Inter regular at 1.18rem. Lead paragraph under H2s, in Ink Muted.

label.purpose: Inter 500 small-caps tracked-out at 0.22em. Section eyebrows, form labels, footer column heads. Always paired with a Fraunces-italic Roman numeral.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: The system has zero box-shadow declarations. Flat by doctrine. Even the hero is unshadowed; the page reads on hairlines and typography alone.

motion.name: ease-quiet
motion.purpose: Reveal-on-scroll opacity + Y translate over 1.1s. Slow, deliberate.

motion.name: marquee-linear
motion.purpose: Logo carousel translate, 45s linear infinite. Pauses on hover.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Default hover transition for color, border, opacity.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Reveal-on-scroll transition. Long enough to read as deliberate.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile small — marquee slot reduces, footer columns collapse to 2.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Tablet — evidence strip collapses to 1 column, marquee slot 170px.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop entry — hero grid switches from 7-5 columns to single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill button used for the lead-form submit. Page-white on midnight-vellum, hover shift to drafting-cyan, 1px lift, active state returns to baseline.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.9rem; padding: 1rem 1.6rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #f3f6ff; color: #0b1020; border: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary .ds-btn-arr { transition: transform 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7dd3fc; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-arr { transform: translateX(3px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7dd3fc; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Pill button used for the nav CTA. Hairline-strong border, page-white text, 1px lift on hover, active returns.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.3rem; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(199,215,240,0.18); color: #f3f6ff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.86rem; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-btn-ghost .ds-btn-arr { transition: transform 0.3s; display: inline-block; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #c8d4ea; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover .ds-btn-arr { transform: translateX(3px); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7dd3fc; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The page's spine: italic Fraunces Roman numeral, hairline bar, tracked-out small-caps label. Used as section eyebrow on every block.
components.html: i.What we do
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8ea0bf; } .ds-section-label .ds-num { font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.95rem; letter-spacing: 0; color: #7dd3fc; text-transform: none; } .ds-section-label .ds-bar { width: 28px; height: 1px; background: #5a6a87; }

components.name: Form Field (underline-only)
components.description: Transparent field with hairline bottom border only. Label is small-caps tracked-out Inter. Typed value is set in Fraunces. Border switches to drafting-cyan on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(199,215,240,0.10); transition: border-color 0.25s; } .ds-field:focus-within { border-bottom-color: #7dd3fc; } .ds-field-label { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.74rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8ea0bf; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field-input { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: 0; color: #f3f6ff; font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.01em; padding: 0; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: #5a6a87; font-weight: 300; } .ds-field-input:focus, .ds-field-input:focus-visible { outline: 0; }

components.name: Brand Wordmark
components.description: INOSX logo: Fraunces 1.5rem weight 400 with a single italic dot in drafting-cyan. The punctuation IS the accent.
components.css: .ds-brand { font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: #f3f6ff; text-decoration: none; } .ds-brand-dot { font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; color: #7dd3fc; margin-left: 0.05em; }

components.name: Industries List
components.description: Horizontal flowing list of industry names in Fraunces display-weight 300, separated by middle dots. Hover lifts to page-white.
components.css: .ds-industries { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; max-width: 50ch; font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.2vw, 2rem); font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.5; color: #8ea0bf; } .ds-industries span { transition: color 0.25s; cursor: default; } .ds-industries span:not(:last-child)::after { content: ' · '; color: #5a6a87; margin: 0 0.4rem; } .ds-industries span:hover { color: #f3f6ff; }

components.name: FAQ Item
components.description: Hairline-bordered details/summary. Title in Fraunces, plus glyph rotates 45deg on open and shifts to drafting-cyan.
components.html:
How does a project with INOSX start?

With a free diagnostic conversation. We map your context, objectives and data, and come back with a lean pilot proposal and a realistic timeline.
components.css: .ds-faq { padding: 2rem 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(199,215,240,0.10); } .ds-faq summary { list-style: none; cursor: pointer; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 2rem; align-items: baseline; font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1.5vw, 1.3rem); letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #f3f6ff; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-faq summary:hover { color: #7dd3fc; } .ds-faq summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-faq summary::after { content: '+'; font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: #8ea0bf; transition: transform 0.3s, color 0.2s; } .ds-faq[open] summary::after { transform: rotate(45deg); color: #7dd3fc; } .ds-faq p { margin-top: 1.25rem; color: #c8d4ea; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 70ch; }

components.name: Evidence Strip
components.description: Replaces conventional 'stats with big numerals' pattern. Three navigable links with one-line claim plus an UPPERCASE 'SEE →' cue. Anchors to the section that contains the actual evidence. The doctrine: navigable proof, not fabricated badges.
components.html: Proprietary products running in productionSee →Clients across multiple continentsSee →Active engagements across industriesSee →
components.css: .ds-evidence { padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem) 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(199,215,240,0.10); } .ds-evidence-inner { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .ds-evidence a { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.25s, color 0.25s; color: #c8d4ea; text-decoration: none; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-evidence a:hover { border-bottom-color: #7dd3fc; color: #f3f6ff; } .ds-ev-line { font-size: 0.96rem; font-weight: 400; } .ds-ev-cue { font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8ea0bf; transition: color 0.25s, transform 0.25s; display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-evidence a:hover .ds-ev-cue { color: #7dd3fc; transform: translateX(3px); }

components.name: Selected Work item
components.description: Three-column row (idx / body / meta) with hairline top border. Idx is Fraunces italic ordinal in drafting-cyan. Body holds the client wordmark plus a single technical sentence. Meta is a small UPPERCASE column listing industry and stack. Replaces the conventional anonymous-testimonial pattern.
components.html:
01

Itaú

Modernization of the credit-origination flow: TypeScript service layer over a legacy mainframe core, integrated with the existing risk pipeline.

Financial servicesNode · TypeScript · GCP
components.css: .ds-work { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr 220px; gap: 3rem; padding: 2.5rem 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(199,215,240,0.10); align-items: start; } .ds-work-idx { font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 300; color: #7dd3fc; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-work-name { font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2vw, 1.8rem); letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; color: #f3f6ff; } .ds-work-desc { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #c8d4ea; max-width: 56ch; } .ds-work-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.35rem; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8ea0bf; }

components.name: Skip Link
components.description: Hidden above the viewport at rest, slides in on :focus. Sits at the top-left, page-white background on midnight-vellum text. The system's a11y signature.
components.css: .ds-skip { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; padding: 0.85rem 1.25rem; background: #f3f6ff; color: #0b1020; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 500; z-index: 100; transform: translateY(-110%); transition: transform 0.2s ease; text-decoration: none; } .ds-skip:focus { transform: translateY(0); outline: 2px solid #7dd3fc; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: INOSX is a software studio, not an AI lab and not an engineering subcontractor. Design and engineering are the same craft. The visual system reflects that: editorial without being magazine-pretty, technical without being terminal-cold, dark without being moody. The atmosphere is a contemporary studio at work: paper-white type on a deep blue-black surface, hairline rules organizing the layout, drafting-cyan as the only accent. Density follows the principle 'show, don't promise': every section earns its space with a real artefact. After pivot v2 the system is monochrome cyan with no decorative orb, no atmospheric blobs and no box-shadow. Numbers are replaced by navigable proof. The voice speaks to a product leader and a CTO at the same time.
keyCharacteristics: Deep blue-black surface (#0b1020), tinted toward the brand hue, never pure black
Paper-white text (#f3f6ff), tinted toward the surface, never pure white
Hairline borders at 10% opacity organize the page; no card backgrounds, no shadows, no atmospheric blobs
Display set in Fraunces variable font with optical-size axis maxed out (opsz 144)
Single accent: Drafting Cyan, ≤10% surface coverage, the only flat color the system pushes
Section labels in tracked-out small-caps with Roman numerals as ordinals (i., ii.)
Italic Fraunces is the signature voice, used sparingly to mark accent words in headlines
Evidence strip replaces fabricated stats; Selected Work replaces anonymous testimonials
Global :focus-visible ring (2px drafting-cyan, 3-4px offset) on every interactive element
Skip-to-content link at the top of the body, visible on focus only
Hero is typographic only — no orb, no illustration, no graphic ornament. The H1 carries the page.

rules.name: The Vellum Rule
rules.body: No surface is pure black or pure white. #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue family.

rules.name: The Ten-Percent Rule
rules.body: Drafting Cyan never paints more than 10% of any screen. Violet, purple, magenta and pink are forbidden — they are the AI-lab tell that this brand refuses.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Structure is communicated by 1px lines at 10% opacity, not by background colour or shadow. Cards are forbidden as a default container.

rules.name: The Italic Signature Rule
rules.body: Fraunces italic at weight 300 is the brand voice. It marks one or two accent words per headline. Never used for full sentences, body text, buttons, labels, placeholders or hover states.

rules.name: The Optical-Size Discipline
rules.body: When Fraunces appears at headline size or larger, opsz axis must be 96 or 144. Skipping this is the fastest way to make the serif look like a free Google Font.

rules.name: The Inter-Quiet Rule
rules.body: Inter never goes above weight 600. The contrast is always Fraunces:Inter, never Inter-bold:Inter-regular.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Zero box-shadow on cards, fields, buttons or modals. The single exception is the form-success / form-error pair, which uses an opaque dark-tinted background plus a 1px border in the same hue family.

rules.name: The No-Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Animated background blobs, drifting radials, parallax layers, glassmorphism panels and ambient particles are forbidden. The page's atmosphere comes from typography and hairlines.

dos: Do speak as a software studio that designs AND builds. 'Product', 'design + build', 'release', 'shipped' over 'engineering', 'system', 'architecture', 'production'.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand blue. Midnight Vellum (#0b1020) and Page White (#f3f6ff) are the only allowed surface and type colors.
Do set every section eyebrow with the trio: italic Roman numeral, hairline bar, tracked-out label. This is the spine.
Do keep accents below 10% surface coverage. Drafting Cyan is the only flat accent. Schematic Blue and Deep Cyan exist solely inside the brand gradient.
Do push Fraunces' optical-size axis (opsz 144 for hero, 96 for H2, 24 for H3). Variable axis is the signature.
Do use one or two italic accent words per headline (Fraunces italic 300). One per section, never more.
Do organize the page with Hairline (10%) borders. Card backgrounds are forbidden as a default.
Do keep buttons to two shapes: pill primary and pill ghost. Anything else is a text link.
Do set form-field values in Fraunces. The user's typed input is a typographic event, not data entry.
Do mask marquee edges with a transparent gradient. Hard cuts at the viewport edge are forbidden.
Do paint a 2px drafting-cyan focus ring with 3-4px offset on every interactive element via global :focus-visible.
Do disable all motion (marquee, reveals, scroll-behavior) when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
Do let the hero earn its weight from typography alone — no orb, no illustration, no graphic ornament.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Both are forbidden by the Vellum Rule.
Don't add box-shadow to cards, fields, buttons or modals. The system is flat by doctrine.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent. Side-stripe borders are an absolute ban.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text anywhere. Period. The previous ordinals exception was retired during polish.
Don't introduce violet, purple, magenta, pink or any saturated non-cyan hue. The palette is monochrome cyan plus tinted neutrals.
Don't add ambient blobs, drifting gradients, parallax layers or glassmorphism. The No-Atmosphere Rule is hard.
Don't ship a card grid. Solutions, pains and products are linear-bordered, not card-filled.
Don't make the page feel like SaaS-cream — no white background, no violet gradient blob behind the hero, no inflated 3D illustrations, no 'AI for everything' hero copy.
Don't make the page feel like an AI lab — no typewriter mono on bone, no asterisk emblem, no 'we believe AI' first-person copy, no 'frontier' buzzword.
Don't make the page feel like a transformation-deck — no stock photo of people in a meeting, no flat-coloured pictogram icons, no navy + gold.
Don't add scroll-jacking, parallax pinning, or WebGL flourishes. Motion is restrained: marquee, breathing orb, reveal-on-scroll. Nothing else.
Don't use Inter weight 700 or above. Heavy Inter is a SaaS tell.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, parentheses.
Don't invent fabricated stats (Trusted by 500+, 4.9/5 stars, 07+ products with gradient numerals). Use the Evidence strip pattern: navigable links to real sections.
Don't ship anonymous testimonials. Use the Selected Work pattern: client name, one technical sentence, industry and stack.
Don't add an orb, an illustration, an emblem, an asterisk-mark or any other graphic ornament to the hero. The H1 carries the page. Decoration was retired in pivot v2.

Don't speak as 'engineering firm' or 'IT consultancy'. The brand is software studio: design + build, product, shipped. 'Engineering' is allowed as a noun for one of the practices, never as the headline of the brand.
